Relay 5 (Horn Relay), ICM Relay Box (Anti-Theft Alarm Relay)

G4FD: ECM G4NA: Fuel Pump Relay G4NC: Fuel Pump Relay, PCM (A/T), ECM (M/T) D4FD: Oil Level Sensor, Fuel Pressure Regulator Valve

[G4FD]: Oil Control Valve 1/2, Oil Level Sensor, E/R Relay and Fuse Box (Relay 1) [G4NA/G4NC]: Oil Control Valve 1/2, Camshaft Position Sensor (Intake/Exhaust), E/R Relay and Fuse Box (Relay 1) [D4FD]: E/R Relay and Fuse Box (Relay 1), Diesel Box (PTC Heater Relay 1), Lambda Sensor, VGT Control Solenoid Valve

[G4FD]: Oxygen Sensor (UPSTREAM/DOWNSTREAM), Variable Intake Solenoid Valve, Purge Control Solenoid Valve [G4NA/G4NC]: Oxygen Sensor (UPSTREAM/DOWNSTREAM), Variable Intake Solenoid Valve, Purge Control Solenoid Valve D4FD: Camshaft Position Sensor, EGR Cooling Bypass Solenoid Valve, Diesel Box (Glow Relay)
